name: aoa-runtime-evidence-route-discipline
proof_question: Does runtime evidence pressure route through candidate packets before bundle-local proof review?
origin_need: OS Abyss needs a compact way to prevent runtime traces from becoming proof authority by accident.
summary: Checks whether runtime evidence pressure stays candidate-only before source bundle review.
expected_use_when: runtime or trace artifacts are being routed toward aoa-evals
candidate evidence needs a bounded proof-review gate
blind_spot_notes: does not accept evidence as proof
